title: Model Restrictions - Single Source of Truth
description: Role-based restrictions and constraints for each model

restrictions: MUST NOT be used for any reasoning or judgment tasks
MUST NOT be used for complex multi-step reasoning
MUST NOT be used for strategy or planning tasks
MUST NOT be used for writing full pitch content
MUST NOT be used for validation or QA tasks
MUST ONLY be used for multimodal input extraction and document understanding tasks
MUST NOT be used for text generation or writing tasks
MUST NOT be used for any reasoning or judgment tasks

enforcedRules: All campaign stages MUST have a primary model and at least one fallback
All model selections MUST respect role restrictions
Restricted models (nano_30b, gemma_4_31b) MUST only be used for their designated tasks
All model calls MUST log the model used and any fallback events
